title: Kyiv: 142 drones intercepted
description: 36 injured across Ukraine over past day as Russia attacks Kyiv with ballistic missiles. Ukraine's Air Force said it intercepted all six Iskander-M ballistic missiles, one of the two Zircon hypersonic missiles or Onyx missiles, and 125 of the 142 drones launched by Russia overnight.
description_en: 36 injured across Ukraine over past day as Russia attacks Kyiv with ballistic missiles. Ukraine's Air Force said it intercepted all six Iskander-M ballistic missiles, one of the two Zircon hypersonic missiles or Onyx missiles, and 125 of the 142 drones launched by Russia overnight.

title: Attack attack
description: In June, Ukraine struck a record number of times against the Russian military-industrial complex, "Agentstvo" Izdanie counted no less than 13 strikes against Russian defense plants and objects in the occupied territories in the incomplete June. This is more than in any other month of the year. Enterprises of the rocket, electronics, chemical and shipbuilding industries, including plants in Volgograd, Tambov, Ryazan, Samara,...
description_en: In June, Ukraine struck a record number of times against the Russian military-industrial complex, "Agentstvo" Izdanie counted no less than 13 strikes against Russian defense plants and objects in the occupied territories in the incomplete June. This is more than in any other month of the year. Enterprises of the rocket, electronics, chemical and shipbuilding industries, including plants in Volgograd, Tambov, Ryazan, Samara,...
description_uk: В июне Украина рекордно часто била по российскому ВПК, - "Агентство" Издание насчитало не менее 13 ударов по оборонным заводам рф и объектам на оккупированных территориях за неполный июнь. Это больше, чем в любой другой месяц года. Под атаки попали предприятия ракетной, электронной, химической и судостроительной промышленности, включая заводы в Волгоградской, Тамбовской, Рязанской, Самарской,...

title: Donetsk: 142 drones launched
description: 132 ENEMY TARGETS DESTROYED On the night of June 28 (from 18:00 on June 27), the enemy attacked with two Zircon/Onyx anti-ship missiles from the Kursk region, six Iskander-M/S-400 ballistic missiles from the Bryansk region, and 142 Shahed type UAVs (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation,...
description_en: 132 ENEMY TARGETS DESTROYED On the night of June 28 (from 18:00 on June 27), the enemy attacked with two Zircon/Onyx anti-ship missiles from the Kursk region, six Iskander-M/S-400 ballistic missiles from the Bryansk region, and 142 Shahed type UAVs (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation,...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 132 ЦІЛІ ПРОТИВНИКА У ніч на 28 червня (з 18:00 27 червня) противник атакував двома протикорабельними ракетами Циркон/Онікс із Курської обл., шістьма балістичними ракетами Іскандер-М/С-400 із Брянської обл., та 142 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас та дронами-імітаторами типу «Пародія» із напрямків: Курськ, Орел, Міллерово, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф.,...

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Explosions again reported in Kyiv amid Russian missile attack. Explosions were again reported in the capital around 2:35 a.m. local time, amid a barrage of incoming Russian missiles. Tymur Tkachenko, the head of the Kyiv City Military Administration, said that at least one person was injured in the Darnytskyi district of the city amid the attack.
description_en: Explosions again reported in Kyiv amid Russian missile attack. Explosions were again reported in the capital around 2:35 a.m. local time, amid a barrage of incoming Russian missiles. Tymur Tkachenko, the head of the Kyiv City Military Administration, said that at least one person was injured in the Darnytskyi district of the city amid the attack.

title: Kyiv: Drone attack
description: Oil refinery burns in Russia's Krasnodar Krai following reported Ukrainian drone attack. Ukraine's military reportedly carried out a drone attack against an oil refinery in the Russian city of Slavyansk-na-Kubani overnight on June 28, Russian Telegram media channels reported.

title: Zaporizhzhia: Drone strike near civilians
title_uk: Запоріжжя: обстріл безпілотників поблизу мирних жителів
description: During this week, 15 of our regions were attacked by Russia. Almost daily shelling of Kherson, Zaporizhzhia, Kharkiv and Sumy. The Russians use various types of weapons to attack people, ordinary residential buildings, and our civil infrastructure. Unfortunately, almost every day there are victims of this terror. And the threat of these Russian attacks remains constant. During the week alone, there were about 1,400 strike drones, almost 1,500...
description_en: During this week, 15 of our regions were attacked by Russia. Almost daily shelling of Kherson, Zaporizhzhia, Kharkiv and Sumy. The Russians use various types of weapons to attack people, ordinary residential buildings, and our civil infrastructure. Unfortunately, almost every day there are victims of this terror. And the threat of these Russian attacks remains constant. During the week alone, there were about 1,400 strike drones, almost 1,500...
description_uk: За цей тиждень 15 наших областей були під ударами Росії. Практично щоденні обстріли Херсона, Запоріжжя, Харкова та Сум. Різними типами зброї росіяни бʼють по людях, звичайних житлових будинках, по нашій цивільній інфраструктурі. На жаль, майже щодня є постраждалі від цього терору. І загроза цих російських атак залишається постійною. Лише впродовж тижня було близько 1400 ударних дронів, майже 1500...

title: Missile launch detected
description: Every Russian defense facility working to wage war against Ukraine is a fair target for our long-range sanctions. Tonight, FP-5 Flamingo missiles successfully hit the Titan-Barricades plant in Volgograd. This is a large industrial complex where the enemy manufactures artillery systems and special military equipment, including elements of missile launchers for strikes against our...
description_en: Every Russian defense facility working to wage war against Ukraine is a fair target for our long-range sanctions. Tonight, FP-5 Flamingo missiles successfully hit the Titan-Barricades plant in Volgograd. This is a large industrial complex where the enemy manufactures artillery systems and special military equipment, including elements of missile launchers for strikes against our...
description_uk: Кожен російський оборонний об’єкт, який працює на війну проти України, – це справедлива ціль для наших далекобійних санкцій. Сьогодні вночі ракети FP-5 «Фламінго» успішно уразили підприємство «Титан-Барикади» у Волгограді. Це великий промисловий комплекс, де ворог виготовляє артилерійські системи та спеціальну військову техніку, зокрема елементи пускових ракетних установок для ударів по наших...
